title: Crocodilodes decurrens

intro:
I couldn't find any information about "Crocodilodes decurrens." However, I found information about Croton lechleri, also known as "dragon's blood" or "Croton lechleri".

Here's a paragraph about Croton lechleri:

Croton lechleri, commonly known as "dragon's blood", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, ulcers, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Croton lechleri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Herbal preparations made from Croton lechleri include tinctures, capsules, and creams, which are used to support wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections.
